title: Download synchronously
content:
Use this endpoint to download an individual invoice synchronously. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform invoice related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/invoice/download/| /v1.3/bc/invoice/download/| |Request parameter data type|`invoice_id`: number
`bc_id`: number |`invoice_id`: string
`bc_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/download/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID. | |invoice_id {Required}|string| Invoice ID.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/download/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&invoice_id={{invoice_id}} --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response Return pdf file stream. If the API call fails, the below parameters will be returned. ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 40104, "message": "The access_token is empty.", "request_id": "{{request_id}}" } (/code) ```
